---
title: "08c_expression_features_boxplots"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and data
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)

expression_rf_varimp <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_rf_top_features.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

model_data_expression_only <- read_rds(
  here("data", "processed", "model_data_expression_only.rds")
)

dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Select top expression features
#--------------------------------------------------

top_expr_features <- expression_rf_varimp %>%
  slice_head(n = 6) %>%
  pull(feature)

expr_plot_df <- model_data_expression_only %>%
  select(survival_500, all_of(top_expr_features)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -survival_500,
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "expression_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    survival_500 = factor(survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    feature = factor(feature, levels = top_expr_features)
  )
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Boxplots by survival outcome
#--------------------------------------------------

p_expr_boxplots <- ggplot(
  expr_plot_df,
  aes(x = survival_500, y = expression_value, fill = survival_500)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Top expression features by 500-day survival outcome",
    x = "Survival > 500 days",
    y = "Expression value",
    fill = "Outcome"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_expr_boxplots)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "top_expression_feature_boxplots.png"),
  plot = p_expr_boxplots,
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)
```

```{r}
p_expr_boxplots <- ggplot(
  expr_plot_df,
  aes(x = survival_500, y = expression_value, fill = survival_500)
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Top expression features by 500-day survival outcome",
    x = "Survival > 500 days",
    y = "Expression value",
    fill = "Outcome"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
expr_plot_df <- model_data_expression_only %>%
  select(survival_500, all_of(top_expr_features)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -survival_500,
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "expression_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    expression_value = log1p(expression_value),
    survival_500 = factor(survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    feature = factor(feature, levels = top_expr_features)
  )
```
